description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this blue nike backpack. It is perfect for the gym and all your sporting endeavors, since it has a wet-dry separator compartment and lots of space to accommodate all your items. It also has a laptop sleeve so you can carry it to office or college as well. A multipurpose bag, engineered with the Sports Fit System for greater comfort, this bag looks ruggedly handsome, and has loads of space- especially made for you!MeasurementHeight: 51 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 16 cmCapacity: 25 litres Made of 90% polyester and 10% nylon on the outside and 100% nylon lining  on the inside for enhanced durability and styleOne main roomy zippered compartment with a padded laptop sleeve, one small zippered compartment and an organiser sleeve for stowing essentialsZippered pouch at the base with a wet/dry separatorBrand badge appliqued on the front and shoulder strapWelded water-resistant zippersHaul loops on the base and top for carrying easePadded, adjustable shoulders straps with mesh lining, engineered with Sport Fit System technology to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenlyMesh panels on the back using the Sport Fit System technology for improved comfort and ventilationErgonomic design to fit along the torso comfortablyBranded zippers and sliders for easy useCareDo not machine washRub surface with damp clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not bleach, line dry, iron or dry clean
